dict.string: SensorForge records video and LiDAR depth for robotics datasets. Camera data is saved locally and only shared when you choose to export.
SensorForge records spatial audio synchronized with other sensors. Audio is saved locally and only shared when you choose to export.
SensorForge logs GPS coordinates with your sensor recordings for navigation and mapping datasets.
SensorForge logs GPS coordinates during background recording sessions.
SensorForge connects to external devices (robots, drones, RC cars) via Bluetooth to log their telemetry alongside phone sensors.
SensorForge connects to BLE devices to capture synchronized telemetry data.
SensorForge records accelerometer, gyroscope, and magnetometer data for robotics datasets.
SensorForge connects to robots and UGVs over WiFi to log their telemetry alongside phone sensors.
